content.content: TikTok star and oldest son of theDougherty Dozen, a family of 14 who rose to fame on TikTok. His mother,Alicia Lee Dougherty, and father, Joshua, post videos about him and his nine siblings to their doughertydozen TikTok account. They have over 7 million followers. He was in foster care in South Dakota before he was matched with his parents on AdoptUsKids. In July 2011, when he was five years old, he was adopted and moved to Pittsford, New York to live with his new family. He posts dance, lip sync and family content on his alex_dougherty1234 TikTok and has over 50,000 followers. He appears in a popular video focusing on February break from 2022. It has accumulated over 1 million views. His father isJoshua Brian Dougherty. He has six younger brothers and three younger sisters. Six days after he was adopted, his parents discovered they were pregnant with his sisterZoey. He has a girlfriend named Natalie. In November 2021, he posted a dance TikTok on his alex_dougherty1234 and set it to music byKaty Perry.
